warnings: Repomix output is a native artifact and is not committed by default.
Bare `npx` does not prove Repomix is installed; install `repomix` or verify it explicitly.
Aider records repo-map guidance without forcing an interactive run.
Baseline guidance output lives in an artifact path and is not committed by default.
Serena records symbol-navigation guidance without auto-configuring global state.
Serena is unavailable on PATH and no command override is configured.
Symbol-navigation output lives in an artifact path and is not committed by default.

🎥 Video Controls

1.0x
0%
0%

# 🎬 YouTube Video Controls Extension A browser extension that adds basic video manipulation controls to YouTube, allowing you to rotate, zoom, and pan videos with precision. Honestly these should be built into YouTube by default, but here we are.
## 🚀 Installation Install from Chrome Web Store [here](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/youtube-video-controls/cddjdndjpiepihbknbjkjghijabbikmh?authuser=2&hl=en). ## 📄 Privacy Policy This extension does not collect any personal data. All transformations are performed locally in your browser without sending any information to external servers. ## 📄 License This project is open source and available under the MIT License. ## 🤝 Contributing Contributions, issues, and feature requests are welcome! Feel free to check the issues page or submit pull requests.
